creator: infofarmer@FreeBSD.org
text:
I cleaned up the port a bit. configure ignores --disable-nls,
so I just took that part out. Also fixed the plist. Here's a
complete diff:
http://people.freebsd.org/~sat/diffs/gpg-crypter.diff

It builds and installs OK, but I can't get it to work. It
says I have no GPG keys, but I have one in ~/.gnupg. Both
"gpg -k" and "gpg2 -k" list that. I'd be grateful if you
helped me to resolve this issue before we commit the port.

Thanks!
